overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character in a blue shirt walking along a dirt path through prairie grasslands at dusk. The character passes a large layered rock butte, traverses a narrow rocky valley, encounters a horse rider, and continues toward distant mountains as the light fades.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie path approaching large rock formation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the prominent layered rock butte

entered.detail: large stratified rock formation with flat top and layered sedimentary structure
narrow winding trail through tall prairie grass
tall green grass covering the rolling hills
tall green grass covering the rolling hills
large rocks scattered across the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open prairie grassland during golden hour. A massive layered rock butte dominates the center of the frame ahead, growing larger as the character approaches. The landscape is wide open with scattered boulders and tall grass on either side of the path.

events.description: rider on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by on the path

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow valley as a horse rider approaches and passes

notable_agents.action: riding a horse toward the camera along the path, then passing by

entered.detail: rocky hillside forming the left boundary of the valley
rocky hillside forming the right boundary of the valley

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower valley corridor with rocky walls rising on both sides. The large rock butte falls behind to the left. A rider on horseback appears in the distance, approaches along the path, and passes by the character. The valley creates a more enclosed feeling with limited sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with distant mountain vista

events.description: ambient light dims significantly as dusk settles, sky darkens from warm orange to deep blue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open valley toward the distant mountain range

entered.detail: large mountain range visible on the horizon with snow-capped peaks
rounded rock formation emerging on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The valley opens up into expansive prairie grassland with a panoramic view of a distant mountain range ahead. The lighting shifts noticeably darker as dusk deepens into evening. The path continues straight toward the mountains, with a distinctive rounded rock butte visible on the left horizon. The scene becomes more atmospheric with darker tones and fading light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open prairie that narrows into a rocky corridor before expanding into a vast evening landscape. It begins with the character walking along a dirt trail toward a massive, layered rock butte that dominates the golden hour horizon. As the character advances, the wide grasslands give way to a narrow valley with towering rocky walls, where a lone rider on horseback approaches and passes by. The scene then opens back up into an expansive prairie, shifting the perspective toward a panoramic view of a distant mountain range. Finally, the lighting deepens from gold to dark atmospheric tones as the character continues straight toward the mountains under the fading light of dusk.
